The pull request looks solid overall but needs a few changes before approval. The error handling in the authentication middleware swallows the original error message, which makes debugging production issues harder. I suggest wrapping errors with fmt.Errorf and the percent-w verb so callers can unwrap them. Test coverage dropped from eighty-eight to eighty-one percent because the new retry logic has no unit tests. Please add table-driven tests covering the success path, transient failure with retry, and permanent failure cases. The naming convention for the helper functions is inconsistent: some use camelCase and others use snake_case. Pick one and apply it throughout the package. Once those three items are addressed I will approve the PR. Nice work on the caching layer — the benchmark numbers show a meaningful improvement in response latency.
